text: Sourdough basics: Combine ripe starter, water, flour, and salt. Mix until shaggy, rest 30 minutes, then perform four sets of stretch-and-folds spaced 30 minutes apart. Bulk ferment until the dough has risen by about 50%, shape, and cold-proof overnight before baking in a preheated Dutch oven at 245C for 20 minutes covered and 20 minutes uncovered.

Quick chickpea curry: Saute onion, garlic, and ginger in oil until soft. Stir in curry powder, cumin, and a pinch of cayenne, then add canned chickpeas, crushed tomatoes, and coconut milk. Simmer 15 minutes, season with salt and lemon juice, and serve over rice with chopped coriander.

Lemon vinaigrette: Whisk together fresh lemon juice, Dijon mustard, a touch of honey, and salt. Slowly stream in olive oil while whisking until the dressing emulsifies. Taste and adjust acidity, sweetness, and salt before tossing with greens or roasted vegetables.
